purpose: Manual review of donor changes since the last local Unica skill adaptation. This is not a checksum attestation.
summary: cc-1c-skills reviewed through 78b5b73fa7f835462dc4073ae7a9fc841e7c62fb; the 17 watched path changes for form-remove, img-grid, skd-edit, subsystem-compile, and web-test are adapted or covered by ADR exceptions and closed by per-entry baselines.

Functional donor drift was ported for form-remove, skd-edit, subsystem-compile, cfe-borrow, cfe-init, and form-validate through Unica boundaries; img-grid and web-test remain ADR-0007 script-backed utility exceptions.
Donor web-test SKILL.md guidance was not copied verbatim because it reintroduces CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR/web-publish assumptions; only the multi-select user-facing contract was adapted into the Unica skill.
ai-rules-1c guidance remains clean through a421cf44eb1f5859cf2a2b74884f8fbcaefc4826.
v8-runner-rust remains clean at the locked v0.5.1 baseline.

decisionPolicy.baselineRule: Move an entry baseline only after the corresponding local skill adaptation or explicit ignore decision is reviewed.

queues.notes: Closed by the ai-rules-1c guidance refresh; future drift should reopen only entries whose primary source is the donor or whose secondary guidance is intentionally tracked.
MCP-level support guard for mutators and help-add is ported. Remaining work is an explicit support-edit capability/flow, which is not a packaged skill today.
Current cbde49 Shirokov functional drift is closed. Remaining command-surface work is product-scoped donor-only capability selection, not accidental upstream drift.

upstreams.baselineReason: Donor head at or before local adaptation commit 795505f2243cf3c93a95918467f99135af758e1b (2026-05-04T07:38:11+07:00).
upstreams.finding: Functional 78b5b73 donor drift was ported for form-remove, skd-edit, and subsystem-compile; img-grid and web-test donor fixes were adapted under ADR-0007 script-backed utility exceptions; earlier cbde49 decisions remain closed by existing entry baselines.

Ported donor v1.3 cleanup semantics into native Rust: form references are removed by suffix and all Default*Form/Auxiliary*Form slots pointing at the removed form are cleared; parity fixture and skill docs were refreshed.

entryDecisions.decisionReason: ADR-0007 records img-grid as a permanent script-backed utility exception for non-XML image annotation; donor validation fixes are adapted locally without creating a typed unica.* tool.
entryDecisions.evidence: Ported donor validation before rendering: --cols must be greater than 0, --rows must be greater than or equal to 0, and auto rows are clamped with max(1, round(sh / step_x)).

entryDecisions.decisionReason: ADR-0007 records web-test as a permanent script-backed utility exception for browser automation; donor runtime fixes are adapted locally without creating typed unica.web_test.* tools.
entryDecisions.evidence: Ported donor multi-select/headerless-grid runtime fixes: selectValuesMulti, dispatchMultiSurface, readCloudDDScript, ROW_CLICK_POINT_FN, HEADERLESS_GRID_FN, rowClickPoint visibleSample diagnostics, checkbox-before-click row fill, and fillFields array delegation; Unica docs preserve autonomous-server/no web-publish guidance.

upstreams.baselineReason: Latest donor commit before local guidance adaptation commits 40d86774d8c21f41c1adeecec696abb039c9bda2 and e5b4eeab4dac92e0c9f60d3f886aa2bb7ef79f80 (2026-05-04).
upstreams.finding: Guidance drift was reviewed. Unica-owned api-design is not donor-derived and is ignored with reason; the remaining affected skills were adapted through public unica.* MCP routing and local reference guidance without importing donor mcp-1c-tools, checkmcp, doctor, or raw donor MCP names.

entryDecisions.evidence: Unica-owned skill based on the Infostart "База по API" model; ai-rules-1c is secondary guidance only and current donor architecture/core edits do not replace the local API model.
Adapted ai-rules async, locks-and-transactions, logging, and verification guidance to public unica.* routing and local background-job review rules.
Adapted platform-solutions, tooling-playbooks, integrations-add, and core standards guidance while keeping BSP usage behind public unica.* tools.
Adapted checkmcp/doctor and verification-checklist guidance into a Unica verification gate using unica.code.diagnostics, unica.code.graph, unica.standards.*, and unica.runtime.execute.
Adapted reviewer, anti-pattern, coding-standard, and verification guidance while preserving Findings-first review output and public Unica MCP routing.
Adapted MCP-first search guidance: public unica.* project-index tools come before shell fallback, and fallback reports what was tried.
Adapted integration, register-design, and architecture guidance for exchange contracts, tenant/external ids, diagnostics, and public Unica MCP routing.
Adapted architecture, core standards, register-design, and integration guidance for tenant boundaries, RLS, rights, and safe query checks.
Adapted performance, DCS, locks-and-transactions, and DBMS evidence guidance with managed locks, lock order, and Unica diagnostics.
Reviewed img-grid-analysis drift; existing Unica local script surface remains valid and no donor-only MCP/tool surface was imported.
Adapted integrations-add and SDD integration guidance for explicit contracts, idempotency keys, structured logging, secret handling, and public Unica MCP routing.
Adapted logging-strategy and locks guidance into runtime evidence rules with structured logging fields and lock/deadlock correlation.
Adapted platform-solutions, core standards, and MCP docs guidance to require version/context checks through public unica.standards.* and Unica contract-gap reporting.
Adapted performance, DCS, and locks guidance for exact query/SKD/DCS extraction, lock-order evidence, and DBMS-aware verification.
Adapted extension-patterns, architecture, and verification guidance for support state, compatibility, migration, and release-readiness checks through Unica.
Adapted core standards, integration, and locks guidance for secrets, TLS/certificate/auth context, rights, tenant boundaries, and safe verification.
Adapted tester, deploy-and-test, checkmcp, and verification-checklist guidance into Unica runtime/test-runner verification and impact-analysis requirements.

upstreams.baselineReason: Bundled tool baseline from third-party/tools.lock.json, sourceTag v0.5.1.
upstreams.finding: Reviewed v0.5.1 runtime changes. It adds a version command and keeps partial-load/build behavior inside the runner contract; Unica MCP still uses typed unica.runtime.execute without new raw flags.

completedQueues.notes: Ported regression runner, split CLI/DOM/engine modules, grid pagination, picture columns, spreadsheet drill-down, multi-context tests, and report formats; adapted bootstrap guidance to Unica autonomous-server and removed prompt-visible donor URLs.

Ported SKD DSL/reference updates, Raw query export, value-list/availableValue parameter editing, and @once patch-query into native Rust runtime behind typed unica.skd.* tools; donor-compatible Python scripts remain only as parity reference fixtures under tests/fixtures/unica_mcp_script_parity/reference_skills. No donor URLs or raw script routing were added to prompt-visible skills.

Ported Form DSL/reference updates into native Rust runtime behind typed unica.form.* tools; donor-compatible Python scripts remain only as parity reference fixtures under tests/fixtures/unica_mcp_script_parity/reference_skills. Prompt-visible skills route only through MCP and references use Unica wording. form-validate intentionally escalates bare Type values from donor warning to error to match platform XDTO import behavior.

Ported meta-info reference presentation output and meta-compile ChoiceHistoryOnInput through typed unica.meta.* and parity fixtures; current support-state/support-guard donor drift after ae824 remains a separate backlog.
Ported read-only support-state reporting from Ext/ParentConfigurations.bin through shared native Unica parser and typed info tools; support-guard and support-edit remain separate backlog items.

Ported donor support guard into the Unica MCP application layer instead of copying it into every script. Guard covers direct XML/DSL mutators with ParentConfigurations.bin rules and editingAllowedCheck deny|warn|off; template-remove wrapper drift is ignored as not applicable to typed MCP routing, while Unica still guards removal of owner metadata.

Ported the only functional remaining validation drift, meta-validate pipe-separated batch mode, through native unica.meta.validate. Reviewed remaining CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR wrapper guidance diffs as not applicable to Unica MCP/package routing.

Ported help-add from a packaged local script flow to typed native unica.help.add. Support guard is applied at the Unica MCP boundary, packaged skill-local scripts were removed, and the donor Python script is retained only as test parity evidence.
Ported functional drift for web-test, cfe-borrow, cfe-init, and form-validate; reviewed EOL-only/raw-wrapper/docs-only and donor-only changes as ignored for the current Unica packaged surface.
